name: slack
description: Slack connector (Web API): read channels/threads and post messages. Read uses a bot token; search needs a user token.

secrets.description: Slack bot token (xoxb-...). Scopes: channels:read, groups:read, channels:history, groups:history, users:read, chat:write.
Slack user token (xoxp-...) — only needed for search_messages (search:read).

tools.name: list_channels
tools.description: List channels the bot can see

tools.name: read_channel
tools.description: Read recent messages from a channel

tools.name: post_message
tools.description: Post a message to a channel/thread (WRITE — confirm with user)
